title: pelargonium × joanneum
intro: Pelargonium × joanneum, commonly known as Geranium or Scented Geranium, is a hybrid plant species within the geranium family, characterized by its fragrant leaves and delicate flowers. The medicinal properties of Pelargonium × joanneum are attributed to its essential oil, which contains compounds like linalool and geraniol, exhibiting anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of this plant include reducing anxiety and stress, relieving digestive issues, and providing relief from menstrual cramps and menopausal symptoms. Herbal preparations of Pelargonium × joanneum include teas, infusions, and essential oil extracts, which can be used topically or internally, although it is essential to consult a healthcare professional before using them for medicinal purposes.
